claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: "Pricing" is a link available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Want to see Gong Assistant in action?"

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
